Sub Category: shifting of the street dogs to other places
Staff Remarks:
Dogs cannot be relocated as per the ABC Rule 2023.
For barking, crying, chasing - nothing can be done since it is a natural instinct of a dog.
Relocation of these dogs is not permissible under the law.
